title: RuidSkin Ultimate
description: Dive into a breathtaking Minecraft world like never before with our ultra-realistic texture pack and stunning visual effects. Unleash your creativity and embark on an epic journey that will leave you spellbound!
body:
# RuidSkin Ultimate
### [ⓘ New website now released!](https://l301.pages.gay)

### [ⓘ Become a member on Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/LingLing1301)

### [ⓘ Subscribe me on PMC](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/lingling1301)

**RuidSkin Ultimate** is a hyper-realistic Minecraft resource pack with incredibly detailed textures and lifelike effects. It comes in four different resolution versions: **256x**, **512x**, **1024x** and **2048x+** and is updated at least once a month. While the **256x** version is free to download, you can access the other versions by becoming a member of the creator's Patreon community. Try out **RuidSkin Ultimate** for an immersive Minecraft experience like no other!

The **RuidSkin Ultimate** in **2048x+** resolution includes some textures that are even higher resolution at **4096x**! This resource pack delivers truly lifelike effects to your Minecraft gameplay, and testing has shown that it is surprisingly light on system resources, meaning you don't need an ultra high-end computer to run it. Experience an even more immersive Minecraft world with **RuidSkin Ultimate**!

You can become a member of my Patreon to access **RuidSkin Ultimate** in **512x+** and even higher resolutions! This resource pack is updated at least once a week and currently contains over **1899+** realistic textures and **2000+** realistic models, to take your Minecraft gameplay to the next level. Join now to get access to the latest **RuidSkin Ultimate** updates and experience Minecraft like never before!
## Features
- **Extremely realistic realism style textures**
- **Compatible with Minecraft Java Edition 1.19.4-1.22+**
- **Includes PBR textures and supports ray tracing for stunning visuals**
- **Regular updates ensure that this resource pack is always evolving and improving**
-----
#### Minimum system requirements for 256x:

**CPU** i3-550 or A6-8550

**GPU** GT 1030 or Radeon HD 6850 X2

**MEM** 2GB DDR3 1333Mhz

**DISK** 20GB HDD

-----
